name: @trycompai/mcp-server
long_description: Comp AI API: Compliance automation API for SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, GDPR, evidence collection, policy workflows, Trust Access, security questionnaires, integrations, cloud checks, and device compliance.

apikey.title: apikey
apikey.description: The apikey to use for the request

tools.name: auto-approve
tools.description:
Auto-approve organization access via domain or self-hosted check

Grants hasAccess on the active organization if the requesting user is an internal trycomp.ai user, the deployment is self-hosted, or the user email domain matches the organization website domain and is an active Stripe customer.

tools.name: exchange-code
tools.description:
Exchange an auth code for device credentials

Exchange an auth code for device credentials in Comp AI. Register employee devices, submit device compliance check-ins, download agent builds, and manage endpoint security status.

tools.name: get-update-file
tools.description:
Download a device-agent update

Download a device-agent update in Comp AI. Register employee devices, submit device compliance check-ins, download agent builds, and manage endpoint security status.

tools.name: head-update-file
tools.description:
Check a device-agent update's metadata

Check a device-agent update's metadata in Comp AI. Register employee devices, submit device compliance check-ins, download agent builds, and manage endpoint security status.

tools.name: generate-auth-code
tools.description:
Create a device-agent auth code

Create a device-agent auth code in Comp AI. Register employee devices, submit device compliance check-ins, download agent builds, and manage endpoint security status.

tools.name: get-my-organizations
tools.description:
List organizations for the current device

List organizations for the current device in Comp AI. Register employee devices, submit device compliance check-ins, download agent builds, and manage endpoint security status.

tools.name: register-device
tools.description:
Register device agent

Register a Comp AI Device Agent installation so employee endpoint checks can report into compliance tasks and device inventory.

tools.name: check-in
tools.description:
Submit device compliance check-in

Submit device security check results for encryption, antivirus, password policy, screen lock, and other endpoint controls.

tools.name: get-device-status
tools.description:
Get device-agent status

Get device-agent status in Comp AI. Register employee devices, submit device compliance check-ins, download agent builds, and manage endpoint security status.

tools.name: revoke-agent-access
tools.description:
Revoke a device agent session

Revoke a device agent session in Comp AI. Register employee devices, submit device compliance check-ins, download agent builds, and manage endpoint security status.

tools.name: create-access-request
tools.description:
Submit Trust Access request

Submit a Trust Center access request with requester details, company context, and review reason for administrator approval.

tools.name: reclaim-access
tools.description:
Reclaim Trust Access link

Request a fresh Trust Access link for a reviewer who already has an active grant on a published Trust Center.

tools.name: get-faqs
tools.description:
Get Trust Center FAQs

Retrieve published Trust Center FAQs for an organization so public trust pages can show customer security answers.

tools.name: get-public-overview
tools.description:
Get Trust Center overview

Retrieve the published Trust Center overview for an organization, including public security posture messaging.

tools.name: get-public-custom-links
tools.description:
List Trust Center custom links

List published custom links shown on an organization Trust Center for customer security and compliance reviews.

tools.name: get-public-favicon
tools.description:
Get Trust Center favicon

Retrieve the favicon URL used by a published Trust Center so embedded or mirrored experiences can match branding.

tools.name: get-public-vendors
tools.description:
List Trust Center vendors

List published vendors and subprocessors for an organization Trust Center so reviewers can inspect third-party posture.

tools.name: get-activity
tools.description:
List recent cloud security activity

List recent cloud security activity in Comp AI. Run AWS, Azure, and GCP cloud security scans, detect enabled services, review findings, and connect cloud posture results to compliance work.

tools.name: get-providers
tools.description:
List supported cloud providers

List supported cloud providers in Comp AI. Run AWS, Azure, and GCP cloud security scans, detect enabled services, review findings, and connect cloud posture results to compliance work.

tools.name: get-findings
tools.description:
List cloud security findings

List cloud security findings discovered by scans so teams can prioritize remediation before issues become audit findings.

tools.name: mark-finding-as-exception
tools.description:
Mark a finding as an exception so it no longer appears in the active Scan Results list

Accepts session, API key, or service token auth. For API key / service token callers without an explicit user attribution, the action is attributed to the org's owner and the audit log description records the calling key/service name.

tools.name: update-aws-scan-mode
tools.description:
Switch the AWS scan engine for a connection (Comp AI scanners ↔ Security Hub)

Accepts session, API key, or service token auth. For API key / service token callers without an explicit user attribution, the action is attributed to the org's owner.

tools.name: revoke-exception
tools.description:
Revoke an exception, reopening the finding

Accepts session, API key, or service token auth. For API key / service token callers without an explicit user attribution, the action is attributed to the org's owner.

tools.name: get-history
tools.description:
List resolution, exception, and regression history for a connection

List resolution, exception, and regression history for a connection in Comp AI. Run AWS, Azure, and GCP cloud security scans, detect enabled services, review findings, and connect cloud posture results to compliance work.

tools.name: get-check-definition
tools.description:
Resolve the "About this check" description for a finding (AI-cached for AWS; provider-derived for GCP/Azure)

Resolve the "About this check" description for a finding (AI-cached for AWS; provider-derived for GCP/Azure) in Comp AI. Run AWS, Azure, and GCP cloud security scans, detect enabled services, review findings, and connect cloud posture.

tools.name: scan
tools.description:
Run cloud security scan

Trigger a cloud security scan for a connected AWS, Azure, or GCP account and collect findings for compliance remediation.
